---
title: "Overview"
---

# Mayon

Mayon is a personal learning app built around a **branchable chat graph**. Chat with an AI about any topic, highlight a dense response, and branch a new conversation from that exact excerpt. Every branch is a node in a navigable tree with breadcrumb navigation and cross-links between separate chats.

From any chat you can generate AI-powered **labs** (hands-on step-by-step guides with interactive checklists) and **quizzes** (multiple-choice, flashcards, and short-answer with AI grading). Both are leaf artifacts tied to a single chat.

Mayon is a **SvelteKit SPA** that connects to a **Mayon server** container running alongside a **Postgres** database. Everything runs locally via Docker Compose — your data stays on your machine.

## Local-first promise

All data stays on your machine. There is no account and no telemetry. Your chats, branches, labs, quizzes, and provider keys live in a local Postgres database inside a Docker volume. The app requires the server to be running; it connects over the local network.

Schema and migrations are managed by **drizzle-kit**. The application logic and repository layer are shared — only the storage driver at the bottom changes.

## Links

- Source code: <https://github.com/bendlikeabamboo/mayon>
- Releases: <https://github.com/bendlikeabamboo/mayon/releases>
